response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience as a full-stack engineer with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and has worked on complex projects involving AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
